summary: Completed testing of iteration 18 features: Tasks system (pending installation reminders), Enhanced Status Tab with 3 sub-views, and LeadUpdate model fix. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working.

minor.issue: Creating a lead with install_date='PENDING' does NOT auto-create a task. Task is only created when UPDATE sets install_date to 'PENDING'. This is by design (per implementation) but worth noting for documentation.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/tasks returns tasks for logged-in salesperson
Backend: Admin GET /api/tasks returns all tasks (no salesperson filter)
Backend: GET /api/tasks with status=pending filter works
Backend: Task auto-created when UPDATE sets install_date to 'PENDING'
Backend: Task auto-completes when UPDATE sets real install date
Backend: PUT /api/tasks/{id}/dismiss marks task as dismissed
Backend: PUT /api/tasks/{id}/complete marks task as completed
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with additional_phones saves correctly
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with products field saves correctly
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with sale_accessories field saves correctly
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with is_self_gen boolean saves correctly
Backend: PUT /api/leads/{id} with promo_code field saves correctly
Backend: All new LeadUpdate fields save together correctly
Frontend: Salesperson login works (Bcardarelli@fshac.com)
Frontend: Status tab has 3 sub-views: All Leads, Pipeline, Tasks
Frontend: Tasks view shows pending tasks with Set Date, Call, Dismiss buttons
Frontend: Task cards display lead name, city, unit type, ticket value, created date
Frontend: Dismiss button works and shows 'Task dismissed' toast
Frontend: Completed tasks section shows completed tasks with install dates
Frontend: All Leads view shows leads table with Call buttons
Frontend: Pipeline view shows 19 pipeline cards with progress bars and Actions buttons
Frontend: Dashboard tab loads with Sales Metrics and charts
Frontend: Admin login works (Bsanchezcar@gmail.com)
Frontend: Admin has 4 tabs: Overview, Salespeople, All Data, Email Ingest
Frontend: Admin Overview shows Company Totals and Lead Status pie chart
Frontend: Admin All Data shows leads with PENDING install dates visible in INSTALL column
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Tasks system implemented correctly - auto-creates on PENDING, auto-completes when real date set
Good: LeadUpdate model now includes additional_phones, products, sale_accessories, is_self_gen, promo_code
Good: StatusTab redesigned with three sub-views and proper data-testid attributes
Good: Task cards show all relevant info (name, city, unit type, ticket value) with action buttons
Good: Completed tasks section is collapsible and shows install dates
Note: Task creation only happens on UPDATE (not CREATE) - this is by design per the implementation
seed_data_creation: Test leads created and cleaned up during backend tests. Some test tasks remain (TEST_TASK_*, TEST_COMPLETE_*, TEST_MANUAL_COMPLETE_*, TEST_DISMISS_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tasks system is working correctly. To create a task: 1) Create/have a SALE lead, 2) UPDATE install_date to 'PENDING'. Task will auto-complete when install_date is set to a real date. LeadUpdate model now supports additional_phones (List[Dict]), products (List[Dict]), sale_accessories (List[Dict]), is_self_gen (bool), promo_code (str). Status tab has three sub-views toggled by buttons: All Leads, Pipeline, Tasks.
